Container.Name: agentcord
Container.Overview: agentcord is a self-hosted Discord LLM frontend with secure memory, safe built-in tools, and config-driven OpenAI-compatible providers.

Config.Name: Config File
Config.Description: Path to agentcord config.yaml. Create this from config-example.yaml before starting the container.

Config.Name: Memory Store
Config.Description: Only writable application state. Stores system prompt overrides and bounded user memory.

Config.Name: Codex Auth File (Optional)
Config.Description: Optional read-only mount for Codex auth.json. If set, configure codex_auth_file: /app/secrets/codex/auth.json in config.yaml. You can generate this file with a separate Codex CLI container and inspect the login URL/code through Docker logs.
